\text{Increase in weight} = \text{New weight} - \text{Initial weight}
\]

\text{Increase in weight} = 600 \text{ pounds} - 400 \text{ pounds}
\]

\[
\text{Increase in weight} = 200 \text{ pounds}
\]

### Step 3: Calculate the Increase in Value
